description_long: This object consists of two pieces of sushi, each featuring a rectangular block of white rice topped with a slice of reddish-brown meat, likely Spam, and wrapped with a dark green strip of nori seaweed. The sushi pieces are neatly arranged side by side on a flat, rectangular brown tray with slightly raised edges. The rice appears compact and slightly rounded at the edges, while the meat slices are uniform in thickness and have a smooth, matte finish. The nori wraps tightly around the center of each piece, providing contrast in both color and texture. The tray itself is simple and unadorned, serving as a neutral background that highlights the sushi.
description: Two pieces of Spam sushi with white rice, reddish-brown meat, and dark green nori, arranged on a plain brown tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing both sushi pieces with visible nori wraps and the tray's raised edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular shape of the sushi and the thickness of the meat slices.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with both sushi pieces and nori wraps visible from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the sushi pieces and the tray's edge.
